content:
Post 1

📉 ASX 200 slipped below its 200-day moving average Thursday, closing at 8,762.50, down 0.26%. Flat year-to-date and now testing a key technical line. The question is whether this is a pause or a signal. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

Energy led at +1.67%, Utilities +1.28%. Materials dragged hardest at -1.48%, A-REITs followed at -1.10%. Rate-sensitive property and commodity stocks took the hit while defensives held ground. #ASX #energy #mining #ausbiz

Post 3

🔺 Fletcher Building surged 7.55% to AUD 2.99, the top ASX 200 mover Thursday. A beaten-down construction name catching a bid. Meanwhile Pantoro Gold collapsed 10.18% to AUD 1.985 — gold price no protection there. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 4

🪙 Gold at AUD 5,928.96/oz, Silver at AUD 85.75/oz. Metals priced in AUD remain elevated with AUDUSD at 0.6931. Yet Materials fell 1.48% — stock-level weakness overriding commodity support. #gold #silver #metals #ASX

Post 5

Watch the 8,762 level. ASX 200 just crossed below its 200-day MA — a line technical traders defend hard. Does it reclaim it Friday or confirm the break? What's your read — dead cat or genuine reversal? #ASX #ausbiz #technicalanalysis
